description: Create a seamless Image Mosaic layer named 'global_mask' from the raster tiles located at 'file:mosaics/world_quadrants'. Using the GeoServer admin interface (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/, admin/Admin123!), configure an 'ImageMosaic' data store named 'world_mosaic_store' within a new workspace named 'imagery'. The final layer should be enabled with correctly computed bounding boxes to provide a single WMS layer combining the four quadrant images.
